parameter.value: Welcome, |PLAYERNAME|. This is a boutique for millionaires and power game legends only! Wanna check the exclusive outfits?
Calm down, |PLAYERNAME|. One VIP at a time, please.
Even the rich need time to think. Bye!
Gone already? Must be busy making more gold.
Maybe when you're feeling more fabulous.
You're not rich enough yet, my friend. Come back when your pockets shine.
